horoscope: You’re looking within, but you’re also staying in touch, and this balanced approach serves you well today, dear Aries. Good energy is with you for your practical affairs. Even with creative projects, you're buckling down and enjoying yourself as you do. It's time to find truly workable solutions to problems. Uranus has just moved into your communication sector, where it will visit for years. This influence can introduce you to a broader, perhaps eclectic, array of mental interests and can revolutionize how you communicate and connect with the world around you. You’ll be opening up and expressing your unique ideas more often. As you think differently, you communicate differently. In the period ahead, your daily life can be colorful, although possibly also a little unpredictable or chaotic. Regular encounters with neighbors, relatives, and acquaintances, as well as everyday activities and business activities, can change dramatically.

You can feel inspired to move forward on a personal goal, dream, or plan, dear Taurus. Ideas are practical and imaginative at the same time. It's a perfect time for feeling needed or reinforced for your input, advice, intelligence, or ideas. You might help guide someone with constructive advice. Uranus has transited your sign for many years, but it has finally left Taurus. Uranus began transitioning out of your sign last year, but has now truly moved on, taking the pressure off to assert your independence. Now, Uranus visits your resources sector for years ahead, bringing excitement to your finances, personal belongings, and concept of comfort and security. There may be a sudden change in financial position, such as a windfall or significant gift, an urge to spend or invest money, a new money-making idea or project that emerges unexpectedly, or new insights into money, financial ability, or self-worth. You may need — or want — to rid yourself of excess baggage. Your take on money, things, comfort, and your value system is evolving! There's a need to be free from certain attachments during this long-term cycle. With income, you are challenged to think outside the box and may be seeking alternative sources. This can be a time of freelance work or various sources of revenue. You can also experience a change of attitude towards accumulating possessions and/or property.

A helpful transit today is excellent for giving a project more energy, dear Gemini. You can draw upon great ambition and determination to push it to a new level. Uranus has just moved into your sign, and it will visit Gemini for many years to come--it’s a significant influence! Mind you, this transit lasts about seven years overall, so you’ll have some time to adjust to it. Conditions in your life that have been stifling or confining become hard to tolerate. It’s a time of personal revolution! Old methods and habits may need to go. The image you present to the world and your personality can alter quite rapidly during this cycle. You tend to embrace change, push yourself beyond your usual limits, express your independent streak, and take a few personal risks. The need to express yourself differently grows as you discover your unique path.

Friends seem sincerely concerned about your needs right now, dear Cancer, or a sense of belonging in a group setting can give you a good feeling. It’s a great time to sort something out, and, as a result, you feel more in charge and confident. Working solidly towards a personal happiness or group goal can be fruitful and fulfilling now. With Uranus now transiting your privacy and soul sector for years to come, you’ll be going through a process of detaching yourself from elements of the past that have been interfering with your self-expression. The coming years may reveal some skeletons in your closet, so you can deal with them to move forward, grow, improve, and explore. With this transit, your dream world is becoming more vivid, and your intuition is exceptionally active. Listen to your inner voice! This Uranus transit can shake things up with matters related to your relationship to the past and your privacy.

The Moon spends the day in your solar second house, dear Leo, which is good for catching your breath and grounding yourself emotionally. It’s also a strong time to work on lifestyle improvements. You’re feeling more confident about what you can accomplish, and you’re especially motivated. Uranus has just begun its transit of your friendship sector, where it will visit for about seven years! During this cycle, your relationships with friends and groups may receive a bit of a shake-up, and you’re likely to meet new and unusual people who introduce you to exciting ideas and ways of life. As you seek greater authenticity in your friendships, you may experience some social ups and downs. Stirring changes are on the horizon in the realms of friendships, group connections, and business plans. Experimentation becomes increasingly important to you as you feel adventurous and courageous.

The Moon spends the day in your sign, dear Virgo, bumping up the volume of your emotional needs. It’s time in the lunar month to listen more closely to your feelings. Particularly creative energy is with you now for promotion and publicity if needed. Today holds much promise for making connections or communicating positively. Things that keep you connected, such as phones, computers, or even vehicles, can also figure strongly or can improve. There can be a happy feeling that you can rise to a challenge. Supporting someone with your insight or providing a loved one with one of your great ideas can be satisfying now. Uranus is now transiting your solar tenth house, and will visit for about seven years. This long-term transit suggests some unpredictability in your career, professional projects, reputation, or public image. However, these areas can also be highly stimulating and innovative. You can bring fresh insight to your work, or your work or health goals can spur you on now. Significant changes are in the works! You may even discover your “true calling” as you feel the need to express yourself more authentically. More courage is with you for breaking out along new paths. People see you differently, and you, in turn, feel differently about your public image.

With today's Moon, getting some extra time for emotional healing and renewal can do you wonders, dear Libra. Still, you can have a strong desire to master a project or resolve problems, and you’re up for a challenge. This can be an excellent day for self-discovery. Uranus is now moving in harmony with your sign, and will continue this transit for about seven years. With it, you may experience a spiritual awakening or a call to see the world–or perhaps even to save it! Learning should be exciting or cutting-edge to keep your interest during this new phase of your life. Life experiences are unpredictable and exciting. It’s a time to embrace change, and fortunately, with Uranus now moving in harmony with your sign, this feels easier to do. The desire to take a new course, delve into a special topic, travel, or embark on new experiences can arise suddenly as you yearn for new experiences.

You're focusing on happiness goals or your social life more heartfully today, dear Scorpio. There can be good, healthy communications with a partner or some positive, supportive feedback that’s motivating. Uranus has just recently left your partnership sector, where it has transited for many years. During this period, changes in your one-to-one relationships were par for the course. Now that Uranus has moved on to your solar eighth house, your relationships are likely to settle down a little. Still, it's now in your intimacy sector, and the ways that you share yourself and your money are set to change and evolve over the coming years. Sudden developments in the financial or emotional support you receive are possible. This can also be a highly creative time for handling money, talents, and relationships. The important thing with this transit is to open up to alternative or non-traditional ways of doing things without throwing practical considerations out in the process.

Your responsibilities and longer-term goals are in stronger focus today, dear Sagittarius. You're likely to enjoy coming up with great ideas for work and health pursuits. You're finding ways to make your life more secure in the long run. Uranus has just moved into your solar seventh house, where it will visit for many years to come. During this cycle, partnerships and relationships with others can be unpredictable and unusual, but also inspiring and exciting. You are attracted to (or attracting) people who are free-spirited, individualistic, and possibly even eccentric or unreliable, as close partners, or you draw these types into your experience. This transit tends to teach you about giving others freedom — trying to force convention or tradition on a partnership will be a lesson in frustration. This long-term trend ties your communication sector to your partnership sector, making it an important time for sharing, learning, and communicating with a partner. Your daily routines are apt to stabilize or level out, however.

A breath of fresh air is vital for your emotional well-being today, dear Capricorn. Today’s energies are strong for creative satisfaction and expressing affection. Learning something that helps move you forward can figure strongly. Uranus has just left your romance and creativity sector, and has set up camp in your work and health sector, where it will spend about seven years! This is a long-term influence that will unfold over time. Your romantic life is likely to level out, though there can be some destabilizing influences on your working life and daily routines. It’s a time when sticking to your usual habits or methods fails to satisfy, and thus can be challenging until you adapt. Rest assured that you'll discover new, more authentic ways of expressing yourself through your routines or work.

You need more depth in your relationships and projects today, dear Aquarius. Advice about money or business can be valuable today, and plans may come together with finances, work, or other practical matters. You can be in a particularly good position to grow a project or to pour extra love and attention into family or domestic activities now. Uranus has just begun its long-term transit of your solar fifth house, where it will visit until 2033 -- a highly significant move! During this long-term trend, you may be attracting more unconventional people and unusual romantic set-ups or pastimes into your life. You’re also likely to expand your interests and discover untapped creative talents. Unique opportunities to meet people pop up or unconventional love affairs can be a new thing for you. All in all, it’s a good time for expressing yourself more freely. You may be very eager to march to the beat of your own drum.

A partner or good friend can be in stronger focus today, dear Pisces, and your desire for companionship or feedback increases. Today holds strong potential for positive experiences and connections. You might enjoy a sense of growth and independence. Your personality shines. Finding new ways to express yourself can be rewarding. You're more thoroughly enjoying what you're doing or learning now, and you can be communicating with exceptional warmth. Uranus has just begun its transit of the home and family sector of your solar chart, where it will visit for years to come. During this cycle, your attitude towards home and family is likely to change, and there can be unconventional or erratic energy surrounding domestic matters. Whether you decide to move or to dramatically change your current living conditions or domestic routines, it's a time to do things in new ways.
